question.text:
Dear @Catherine Kang/CUL-CN/IT <mail

 

Copy @Claudia Goh/CUL-SG/LH Trade <mail

 

We have got confirmed instruction from Ricky about this issue. Ricky sir has agreed to adjust this manually in our system. 

Please following up the adjustment directly, please add DFSU2687754 to the original BL directly, follow the practice of PIL.

Thank you.

Sean Wang / 王晓旭

Representative

CULINES SHIPPING LLC (WEST ASIA)

MOB: +971-50-696-5918

Email: seanwang@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 

发件人: Sean Wang/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <seanwang@culin

answer.text:
Thanks for EQC Team’s support.

 

Dear Claudia and Sean,

 

Now the container DFSU2687754 is registered at CNSHKT07 in system, please kindly attach it to the booking CULVSHK2603329 and perform the Freight & Surcharge calculations and all necessary processing as well.

 

If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact us.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年1月28日 11:35
收件人: Catherine Kang/CUL-CN/IT <catherinekang@culines.com>; Sean Wang/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <seanwang@culines.com>; Claudia Goh/CUL-SG/LH Tra
